title: The Seeds of Life

[]: The Seeds of Life Post by Zerul » Sun Aug 26, 2012 10:08 pm (This is my first thread ) Now we all know that the Adam and Lilith are seeds of life...That ends all I know. But that alone raises questions, Are the SOL still around? How advanced were/are they? Why do they create life? Now I have been back on the Wagon with with NGE, and I'm pretty rusty, so maybe we can put our heads together and maybe make sense of them? So...with that...
